remember: Students will be able to identify and recall the different primary activities.
Students will be able to list and describe the various primary activities.
Students will be able to explain the characteristics of primary activities.
understand: Students will be able to understand the importance of primary activities in a country's economy.
Students will be able to explain the relationship between primary activities and the development of a country.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of primary activities on the environment.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of primary activities to real-world scenarios.
Students will be able to analyze the data related to primary activities and draw conclusions.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different primary activities in a country.
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast different primary activities and their impact.
Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of different primary activities.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of primary activities in the development of a country's economy.

ncert_objectives: To understand the different primary activities and their significance in a country's economy.
To identify and describe the various methods of primary activities such as agriculture, forestry, mining, and fishing.
To analyze the impact of primary activities on the environment and human societies.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and explain the different types of primary activities.
To describe the importance of primary activities in the development of a country's economy.
To analyze the data related to primary activities and its impact on the environment.
